title: Ternary Cloud Cost Budget
description: Schema for a cloud cost budget in the Ternary FinOps platform, including spend targets, current spend, and alert thresholds.

description.description: Optional description of what this budget covers

period.description: Budget period - how often the budget resets

cloud_provider.description: Cloud provider scope for this budget

current_spend.description: Current period spend against this budget in USD

forecasted_spend.description: ML-forecasted spend for the current period in USD

alert_thresholds.description: List of budget threshold percentages that trigger alerts (e.g., [50, 80, 100])

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the budget was created

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the budget was last updated

examples.name: Production GCP Budget
examples.description: Monthly budget for production GCP environment
